sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cintas beats revenue estimates, matches profit forecast as shares dip
feed.summary: Cintas reported stronger-than-expected revenue and met its profit forecasts, but its shares still declined due to a modest outlook compared to analysts' estimates. The company, known for its uniform and facility services, anticipates full-year revenue between $9.60 billion and $9.70 billion and diluted EPS between $14.65 and $14.95. Despite beating quarterly revenue estimates, the stock dropped 3% as the outlook suggested slower growth.

feed.title: The S&P 500’s correction is getting closer to its ending, says Morgan Stanley’s Mike Wilson
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's chief equity strategist, Mike Wilson, suggests that the S&P 500's market correction is nearing its end. This assessment provides a potentially optimistic outlook for investors who have been navigating recent market volatility. Further details within the full article would likely elaborate on the factors contributing to this prediction and what investors might expect next.

feed.title: Insulet Appoints Mike Panos as Chief Commercial Officer
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation has appointed Mike Panos as its Executive Vice President, Chief Commercial Officer. Panos brings 30 years of commercial leadership experience from Stryker Corporation and will be responsible for leading Insulet's global commercial organization, driving strategy, and expanding market access for its Omnipod products. This appointment aims to strengthen Insulet's commercial capabilities and accelerate growth in the automated insulin delivery market.

feed.title: Baxter rolls out barcode IV labels aimed at cutting bedside errors
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. has launched its new IV Verify Line Labeling System, an automated solution designed to improve IV labeling in healthcare settings and reduce medication errors. The system replaces inconsistent handwritten labels with clear, standardized, barcode-scanned labels, streamlining nursing workflows and enhancing patient safety. This introduction reflects Baxter's commitment to advancing safer infusion practices through clinician-focused innovation, in partnership with Vigilant Software.

feed.title: Mission Underwriters launches LatAm reinsurance platform from Miami
feed.summary: Mission Underwriters, a US-based program administrator, has launched a new Latin America reinsurance platform operating out of Miami, aiming to capitalize on the region's underserved insurance market. The platform will be led by Alejandro Pedroza, former CEO of AIG Ecuador, and will target niche facultative reinsurance opportunities across property, financial lines, and specialty segments. This expansion reflects growing international interest in Latin America's reinsurance landscape, where insurance penetration remains low and a significant climate-related protection gap exists.

feed.title: Rail equipment maker Wabtec schedules April 22 earnings call
feed.summary: Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 results before the U.S. financial markets open on April 22, 2026. The company will also hold a conference call for analysts and investors at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the webcast via Wabtec’s investor relations website.

feed.title: DPL pushes $400 million note consent deadline back to March 31
feed.summary: DPL LLC has extended the deadline for its consent solicitation for the 4.35% Senior Notes due 2029 to March 31, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. New York City time. This extension aims to secure more participation after only approximately 39% of the $400 million notes had consented by the previous March 27 deadline. A $1,000,000 aggregate consent payment will be distributed among consenting holders if a majority threshold and other conditions are met.

feed.title: AMD Stock Gains Momentum As UBS Eyes 54% Upside On AI Megadeals
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is showing strong momentum, with its stock rising in Benzinga Edge's rankings. UBS maintains a bullish $310 price target, predicting a 54% upside due to AI megadeals and strength in its CPU business. The company is expected to see significant catalysts in the second half of 2026 with MI450 shipments to OpenAI and Meta, and potentially a "third GW-scale customer" like Microsoft.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Co Stock Gains Momentum as Deutsche Bank Upgrades to Buy with $98 Target Amid Grow
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has upgraded Colgate-Palmolive Co (NYSE:CL) to Buy from Hold, raising its price target to $98 from $90, citing the company's strong gross margins and strategic growth initiatives for 2030. This upgrade, along with a "Moderate Buy" consensus from other analysts, highlights Colgate-Palmolive's position as a stable dividend payer in the consumer staples sector. The company's focus on premiumization, data-driven innovation, and a robust global business model supports its continued financial strength and resilience against market volatility.

feed.title: Is Ecolab (ECL) The Best Under-The-Radar AI Stock to Buy Now?
feed.summary: Ecolab (ECL) is emerging as an AI play due to its acquisition of CoolIT Systems, a direct-to-chip liquid cooling solution provider, for $4.75 billion. This positions Ecolab to address the water-based cooling challenges of data centers with its closed-loop technology, which is crucial given the projected 56% global water deficit by 2030. The company's solutions are expected to become essential for tech and industrial businesses, earning it the 7th spot in Bill Gates’ 2026 portfolio.

feed.title: -1.25% for Dover stock as selling pressure intensifies below key moving averages
feed.summary: Dover Corporation (DOV) stock dropped 1.25% to $206.60, indicating intensified selling pressure, and is trading below key short- and medium-term moving averages. Despite a long-term bullish structure, various technical indicators signal a bearish environment. The stock is expected to consolidate between $202 and $210 next week, with significant downside risk if critical support levels are breached.

feed.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include BrightSpring, Aura Minerals, DXP and Mistras
feed.summary: This article from Zacks.com highlights four stocks—BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG), Aura Minerals (AUGO), DXP Enterprises (DXPE), and Mistras Group (MG)—as compelling buys due to their solid cash-flow growth. The analysis emphasizes the importance of strong, increasing net cash flow as a key indicator of a company's financial health, resilience, and ability to fund growth, meet obligations, and manage market uncertainties. Each company's recent earnings estimate revisions are noted, underscoring their financial strength.

feed.title: Is Philip Morris International Stock Undervalued Stock Or Value Trap?
feed.summary: The article discusses whether Philip Morris International (PM) stock is undervalued or a value trap, highlighting its reasonable growth, strong cash flow, low debt, and modest valuation. It details the company's accelerating transition to smoke-free products like IQOS, while also presenting bear arguments concerning ZYN growth deceleration and increasing regulatory risks. The piece concludes by suggesting PM is at a pivotal point, with balanced sentiments among investors.

feed.title: MoffettNathanson cuts American Tower stock price target on valuation
feed.summary: MoffettNathanson has reduced its price target for American Tower stock (NYSE:AMT) to $214 from $231, while still maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment is due to reduced valuation multiples across the company's business segments, including domestic tower, international tower, and data center operations. Despite the lowered target, which suggests the market has already factored in significant headwinds, the firm continues to recommend the stock as a Buy.

feed.title: Did Cardinal Health's (CAH) New Chair and Urology Deal Just Reframe Its Healthcare Partnership Strategy?
feed.summary: Cardinal Health recently appointed Patricia A. Hemingway Hall as the new Chair of its Board, succeeding Gregory B. Kenny. This leadership change, coupled with a recent urology-focused acquisition, is seen as continuity in the company's strategy to expand into higher-margin specialty businesses. The article suggests these moves are crucial for Cardinal Health to improve profitability amid thin margins and regulatory pressures, aiming for $317.2 billion in revenue and $2.6 billion in earnings by 2029 with a projected fair value of $249.60.

feed.title: Legal chief exits Neogen (NASDAQ: NEOG) effective March 31, 2026
feed.summary: Neogen Corporation announced that its Chief Legal and Administrative Officer, Amy Rocklin, will depart the company effective March 31, 2026. This leadership change was reported via an 8-K filing on March 30, 2026. The filing confirms that R. Bryan Riggsbee, the Chief Financial Officer, signed the report on behalf of Neogen.

feed.title: After 33% Plunge, First Solar Stock Faces A Death Cross — And Here Comes Tesla
feed.summary: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) stock has experienced a significant downturn, plunging over 33% from its recent peak and triggering a "death cross" — a bearish technical signal. This technical weakness coincides with Tesla's reported $2.9 billion investment in solar manufacturing equipment, potentially positioning it as a direct competitor in the U.S. utility-scale solar market, historically First Solar's domain. While First Solar still presents strong fundamentals and tax credit opportunities, the market appears to be re-evaluating its valuation given the new competitive threat and weakening price action.

feed.title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Is Up 5.2% After Launching 260-Lane AI Data Center Switches - What's Changed
feed.summary: Marvell Technology announced new Structera S 60260 PCIe 6.0 and S 30260 CXL switches, designed to enhance bandwidth and efficiency in AI data centers. These 260-lane switches are expected to reinforce Marvell's position in high-radix switching for AI clusters and support the increasing demand for memory-intensive AI workloads. The company's investment narrative continues to hinge on its ability to secure major design wins with hyperscaler clients, despite the inherent risk of heavy revenue reliance on a small number of these large customers.

feed.title: Western Digital Explores Quantum Error Correction To Extend Data Reliability Story
feed.summary: Western Digital has joined an open-source quantum error correction initiative with Open Quantum Design and QuScript to enhance quantum computing reliability. This move expands Western Digital's involvement beyond traditional storage into system-level error correction for future quantum systems. Despite some near-term stock volatility, this initiative positions Western Digital to influence technical standards in the evolving quantum computing landscape, leveraging its expertise from hard drives and AI data centers.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) Now Covered by Analysts at Citizens Jmp
feed.summary: Citizens Jmp initiated coverage on Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) with a "market outperform" rating and a $190 price target, suggesting a 30% upside. The company reported a revenue beat but an EPS miss in its latest quarter. Institutional investors hold 74.52% of the stock, with Vanguard Group Inc. and Principal Financial Group Inc. being major holders.

feed.title: Indigenous-owned Pure Casino bids for Gamehost with backing from U.S. real estate giant
feed.summary: Indigenous-owned Pure Casino Entertainment LP is attempting to acquire publicly traded Gamehost Inc. The deal involves Pure financing the purchase by selling Gamehost's four Alberta properties for $200-million to VICI Properties Inc., a U.S. real estate company specializing in casino ownership. VICI Properties, which already supports Pure Casino's existing properties, sees this expansion as part of its strategy to grow its Canadian portfolio, citing strong growth prospects in the domestic gaming industry.

feed.title: As J&J Brings Icotyde to Market, AbbVie Remains Confident in Skyrizi’s Efficacy Edge
feed.summary: AbbVie is confident that its immunology drug, Skyrizi, maintains an efficacy advantage over Johnson & Johnson and Protagonist Therapeutics' newly approved oral pill, Icotyde, despite the latter entering the market for plaque psoriasis. Analysts at BMO Capital Markets note that Skyrizi offers superior efficacy and a less frequent dosing schedule, which patients may prefer over Icotyde's daily oral regimen. While Icotyde is expected to achieve significant sales, AbbVie believes Skyrizi will remain a key growth driver, supported by its strong clinical data.

feed.title: Skiers Are In Trouble This Season, And One Firm's Fortunes Are Suffering
feed.summary: Vail Resorts, Inc. (MTN) shares are trading lower after the ski resort operator reported weaker early-season metrics and warned full-year earnings would miss prior expectations due to "one of the worst early season snowfalls in the western U.S. in over 30 years." The company's stock is experiencing a bearish trend, with analysts divided on its future, although some see potential upside. Investors are looking ahead to the next earnings report on March 9.

feed.title: Molecular Partners Sets 2026 AGM, Nominates Clare Fisher to Board as Long-Serving Director Steps Down
feed.summary: Molecular Partners has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for April 14, 2026, and announced the nomination of Clare Fisher to its Board of Directors. This move coincides with long-serving director Steven H. Holtzman stepping down, indicating a governance change as the company advances its DARPin pipeline. Fisher's extensive background in global business development, M&A, and strategy underscores the company's focus on dealmaking and portfolio expansion, with the stock currently rated a Hold by analysts and Spark’s AI Analyst.

feed.title: Revenue slipped, but Functional Brands turned a Q4 loss into profit
feed.summary: Functional Brands (NASDAQ: MEHA) reported turning a Q4 2025 net loss into a profit, with Q4 net income of $0.9 million despite an 11% year-over-year revenue decline due to an Amazon business model shift and exit from the hemp business. Full-year 2025 revenue saw a slight increase of 0.7% to $6.61 million, resulting in $0.8 million in net income. The company also launched a new digital health platform, Tru2u.health, and expanded international distribution for its Kirkman brand.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies Adjusts Valuation Amid Strong Institutional Support and Financial Metrics
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies has seen its valuation grade shift from "very attractive" to "attractive," reflecting a refined assessment of its financial health and market standing. Key financial metrics include a P/E ratio of 22, an 18.80% return on capital employed, and a low debt-to-EBITDA ratio of 0.90 times. Despite flat operating cash flow, the company maintains strong institutional support with 93.78% holdings.

feed.title: Molecular Partners Ag Announces That Current Board Member Steven H. Holtzman Will Not Stand for Re-Election
feed.summary: Molecular Partners AG announced that current Board member Steven H. Holtzman will not seek re-election at the upcoming Annual General Meeting on April 14, 2026. This decision follows 12 years of his service on the company's Board of Directors. The news impacts the governance of the clinical-stage biotech company focused on DARPin therapeutics.

feed.title: TI unveils high-performance isolated power modules
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TI) has introduced new isolated power modules, UCC34141-Q1 and UCC33420, featuring their IsoShield technology. This proprietary multichip packaging solution offers up to three times higher power density than discrete solutions. The technology aims to increase power density, efficiency, and safety in applications like data centers and electric vehicles, while also significantly reducing solution size and improving reliability.

feed.title: Sysco to buy catering supplier Jetro Restaurant Depot in $29-billion deal
feed.summary: Sysco announced its acquisition of catering supplier Jetro Restaurant Depot for $29 billion, including debt, aimed at expanding its reach among independent restaurants. This deal, funded through debt, cash, and equity, will make Jetro Restaurant Depot shareholders owners of 16% of Sysco. The integration is expected to enhance value for small restaurants by providing more affordable food products and is projected to add to Sysco's earnings per share by its fiscal 2027.

feed.title: Prudential's $1.5 trillion asset manager takes 'Keep Asking' to 7 markets
feed.summary: PGIM, Prudential Financial's global asset management business with $1.5 trillion in assets, has launched a new brand campaign called "Keep Asking." The campaign emphasizes curiosity, questioning assumptions, and challenging conventions to achieve better outcomes, rolling out in seven markets including the U.S., U.K., and Japan. It features Claymation-inspired animation across digital, video, and print media, aiming to highlight the rigorous work behind investment recommendations.

feed.title: NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE® CHRISTENS THE STUNNING NORWEGIAN LUNA™ - THE NEWEST SHIP TO SAIL TO THE CARIBBEAN AND THE BAHAMAS FROM MIAMI
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line christened its newest ship, Norwegian Luna, in Miami on March 27, 2026. The ship offers round-trip Caribbean cruises, including visits to NCL's private destinations Great Stirrup Cay, Bahamas, and Harvest Caye, Belize, and features family-friendly attractions like the Aqua Slidecoaster and new experiences such as Luna Midway and Moon Climber. After its Miami season, Norwegian Luna will offer Bermuda itineraries from New York starting April 2027.

feed.title: Boston Scientific announces conference call discussing first quarter 2026 results
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) will host a webcast conference call on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss its financial results and business highlights for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. Prior to the call, the company will release its financial results. The event will feature Chairman and CEO Mike Mahoney and EVP and CFO Jon Monson, with a live webcast and replay available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE® CHRISTENS THE STUNNING NORWEGIAN LUNA™ - THE NEWEST SHIP TO SAIL TO THE CARIBBEAN AND THE BAHAMAS FROM MIAMI
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCL) recently christened its newest ship, Norwegian Luna™, in Miami on March 27, 2026. This vessel offers diverse onboard experiences, including family-friendly activities like the Aqua Slidecoaster and adult-only shows, and will sail Caribbean itineraries through April 2027, visiting NCL's resort-style destinations, Great Stirrup Cay and Harvest Caye. The ship, with renowned street artist ELLE as its godmother and hull artist, boasts innovative design and a wide array of dining and entertainment options for multigenerational travelers.

feed.title: Ex-Blackstone staffers raise $25 million for startup Valinor, which aims to put private credit on the blockchain
feed.summary: Former Blackstone employees Connor Dougherty and Lily Yarborough have launched Valinor, a startup that has raised $25 million to bring private credit to the blockchain. The company aims to make the lending process more efficient by leveraging smart contracts to automate rule-based credit lines, an improvement over traditional human-reliant systems. Valinor plans to use the new capital to expand its lending operations to fintech and crypto companies and hire more staff, focusing on "real economy credit."

feed.title: Doble Enhances Mobility and Versatility in Partial Discharge Surveys with Spark P2
feed.summary: Doble Engineering has released the Spark P2, a new handheld partial discharge (PD) and radio frequency interference (RFI) measurement device. This compact and versatile tool is designed to enhance mobility for field engineers and technicians, offering comprehensive diagnostics and analysis for various applications like substation surveys, switchgear testing, and cable accessories. The Spark P2 integrates advanced features, including "Wizard Mode" for new users and "Expert Mode" for experienced professionals, allowing for seamless data acquisition and analysis with the Doble Pulse software.

feed.title: Teledyne to Deliver Advanced Detectors for the Lazuli Space Observatory, Accelerating Next-Generation, Open-Access Astronomy
feed.summary: Teledyne Space Imaging has secured a contract from Schmidt Sciences to supply advanced near-infrared detectors and custom electronics for the Lazuli Space Observatory. This observatory, part of the Eric and Wendy Schmidt Observatory System, aims to revolutionize open-access astronomy by observing supernovae and transient events to map the universe's expansion while accelerating scientific discovery. Teledyne's H4RG-10 FPAs are crucial for enabling the observatory's integral field spectrograph to capture faint signals with unprecedented sensitivity and spectral resolution.

feed.title: ADL and JLens Urge GE Aerospace Shareholders to Vote AGAINST Proposal 7 in Annual Meeting Proxy
feed.summary: ADL and JLens are calling on GE Aerospace shareholders to vote AGAINST Proposal 7, which criticizes GE Aerospace's provision of defense products to the Israel Defense Forces. They argue that the proposal is discriminatory, part of an Israel-focused pressure campaign by the BDS movement, and risks harming GE Aerospace's defense business and shareholder value. Both organizations emphasize that foreign military sales decisions are primarily governed by U.S. government foreign policy and export-control frameworks.

feed.title: A new space observatory picks Teledyne sensors to track supernovae
feed.summary: Teledyne Space Imaging has secured a contract with Schmidt Sciences to supply advanced near-infrared H4RG-10 flight focal plane arrays and custom electronics for the Lazuli Space Observatory. This observatory, part of the Eric and Wendy Schmidt Observatory System, aims to revolutionize open-access astronomy by observing supernovae and other transient events to understand the universe's expansion. Teledyne's high-sensitivity detector technology will enable the observatory's integral field spectrograph to capture faint signals with unprecedented precision, supporting critical astrophysical research.

feed.title: Backed by 500+ lenders, this fraud tool just won a FICO award
feed.summary: SentiLink has won a 2026 FICO Industry Vanguard Decision Award for its innovation in detecting identity theft at origination. The company's Identity Theft Score, built on proprietary fraud labels from over 500 financial institutions, offers more precise and earlier detection of stolen identity applications. SentiLink's solution is now available on FICO Marketplace, allowing FICO Platform customers to integrate real-time stolen identity detection into their decisioning workflows.

feed.title: Tax Refunds Supporting U.S. Households - Northern Trust - Commentaries
feed.summary: Northern Trust's Ryan Boyle observes that tax refunds, although representing an overpayment, are perceived as a windfall by U.S. households. This year's "One Big Beautiful Bill" is expected to lead to larger refunds, particularly benefiting higher earners. However, rising oil prices and a cooling labor market temper the potential for a significant boost to discretionary spending, with many households already showing signs of financial strain.

feed.title: Caterpillar, Vistra, Target And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: Experts on CNBC's 'Final Trades' recommended Vistra, Caterpillar, Citigroup, and Target. JPMorgan and Citigroup analysts have recently raised price targets for Vistra and Caterpillar, respectively. Target announced price reductions on over 3,000 items, while Citigroup shares fell after refuting acquisition reports.

feed.title: PDD Holdings (NASDAQ: PDD) Form 144 lists ADS resale, Citigroup as broker
feed.summary: PDD Holdings Inc. has filed a Form 144 notice disclosing the potential resale of American Depositary Shares (ADSs), with each ADS representing four Class A ordinary shares. Citigroup Global Markets is listed as the broker for this transaction. The filing indicates an acquisition under the company's share incentive plan on March 1, 2026, and a filing/date reference of March 30, 2026, with trading to occur on NASDAQ.

feed.title: CoStar Group Confirms Domain Layoffs
feed.summary: CoStar Group has confirmed layoffs at its Australian residential real estate portal, Domain, affecting roles in product, tech, and marketing. The company states these changes are to align the business with growth ambitions and are being offset by continued hiring in new fields, resulting in an overall headcount increase. The relationship between CoStar Group and Domain is described as highly collaborative.

feed.title: Chipotle's burrito game returns with free food and $0 delivery day
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its popular Burrito Vault game, the "Double Protein Edition," from March 30 to April 1, 2026, offering over $2 million in prizes, including free burritos for a year. The promotion ties into Chipotle's new High Protein Menu and will culminate with a $0 delivery fee on National Burrito Day, April 2, for Rewards members in the U.S. and Canada. This initiative aims to drive digital engagement and highlight the increasing consumer interest in protein-rich meal options.

feed.title: CHIPOTLE LAUNCHES BURRITO VAULT: DOUBLE PROTEIN EDITION WITH OVER $2 MILLION IN CHIPOTLE PRIZES FOR NATIONAL BURRITO DAY
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its popular "Burrito Vault" game for National Burrito Day (April 2), featuring a new "Double Protein Power Hour" and over $2 million in prizes. Rewards members can play daily from March 30 to April 1 to guess burrito order combinations for a chance to win free burritos for a year, BOGO entrées, or free double protein, aligning with increased consumer interest in high-protein meals. Additionally, Chipotle will offer a $0 delivery fee on digital orders on National Burrito Day.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. Stock: AI Momentum and Strategic Positioning in Semiconductors for Nort
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) is a pivotal player in the semiconductor industry, leveraging its advancements in AI computing and data center solutions. The company's strategic positioning, especially in agentic AI and server CPUs, is driving long-term growth and investor interest. AMD continues to expand its market share against competitors like Intel and NVIDIA, with strong financial performance and analyst optimism for future growth in AI-driven markets.

feed.title: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Analog Devices, CrowdStrike, Expedia, Instacart, Live Nation, Qualcomm, Seagate, Starbucks, and More
feed.summary: This article summarizes top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for Monday, March 30, 2026, highlighting key market movements. It notes that major indices are nearing bear market territory after five consecutive weeks of losses, with oil prices surging due to geopolitical tensions. Investors are advised to be cautious, as selling could accelerate, and detailed analyst calls are provided for various companies including Analog Devices, CrowdStrike, Expedia, and Starbucks.

feed.title: Melco Resorts (MLCO) files Form 144 to sell 390,000 shares via Citi
feed.summary: Melco Resorts and Entertainment Limited (MLCO) has filed a Form 144 to sell 390,000 ordinary shares through Citigroup Global Markets on NASDAQ. These shares are part of an issuer stock incentive plan, awarded on March 31, 2023, with the filing/transaction date being March 30, 2026. This filing indicates an intended sale and is considered a routine disclosure with minimal anticipated market impact.

feed.title: Cencora, Inc. (COR) Signs Binding Agreement to Expand Retina Network With EyeSouth Acquisition
feed.summary: Cencora, Inc. (COR) has signed a binding agreement to acquire the retina division of EyeSouth Partners for $1.1 billion, aiming to expand its Retina Consultants of America network. This acquisition will integrate EyeSouth's regional physician network, enhance advanced retina care delivery, and reinforce Cencora's commitment to community-based ophthalmologists. Additionally, Cencora reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 adjusted diluted EPS outlook and announced the retirement of CFO James F. Cleary.

feed.title: Yarbrough Capital LLC Has $10.16 Million Holdings in MercadoLibre, Inc. $MELI
feed.summary: Yarbrough Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in MercadoLibre, Inc. (NASDAQ:MELI) by 24.6% to 5,044 shares, valued at approximately $10.16 million. Despite an EPS miss, MercadoLibre's revenue grew by 44.6% year-over-year to $8.76 billion. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $2,708.67, even amidst some recent analyst target reductions.
